Presence of Issues in the Code\n- **Functionality:** The code correctly sets up Jest with TypeScript support, coverage options, and other standard configurations.\n- **Malicious behavior:** There is no evidence of malicious code, dynamic execution, external data handling, or suspicious logic.\n- **Source map comment:** The `//# sourceMappingURL=jest.config.js.map` is typical for transpiled TypeScript files, aiding debugging.\n\n**Conclusion:** The code appears legitimate, with no issues or malicious elements.\n\n---\n\n### 2.
